task: place the butter dairy in the black bowl
raw:
SCENE ANALYSIS - A yellow butter dairy is on a wooden table. A black bowl is on a blue tray. The butter dairy is small and yellow; the bowl is large and black. STRATEGY - First, reach and grasp the butter dairy. Then, transport it to the black bowl. Finally, place it inside the bowl. Failure modes include dropping the butter dairy during transport or misplacing it outside the bowl. AFFORDANCE REASONING - Step 1 reach the butter dairy at its body for initial contact. Step 2 grasp the butter dairy at its body for secure hold. Step 3 transport the butter dairy to the bowl's interior. Step 4 place the butter dairy inside the bowl.
Goal: inside(butter_dairy, black_bowl)
Scene: butter_dairy, black_bowl, blue_tray, table
Step 1: reach(butter_dairy)
  affordance_region: the body of the yellow butter dairy
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, butter_dairy, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, butter_dairy) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(butter_dairy)
  affordance_region: the body of the yellow butter dairy
  contact: holding(butter_dairy) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(butter_dairy)
Step 3: transport(butter_dairy -> black_bowl)
  affordance_region: the interior of the black bowl
  spatial: above(butter_dairy, black_bowl, 0.05) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(butter_dairy)
  done_when: above(butter_dairy, black_bowl, 0.05)
Step 4: place(butter_dairy -> black_bowl)
  affordance_region: the interior of the black bowl
  contact: surface_contact(butter_dairy, black_bowl) [completion]; released(butter_dairy) [completion]
  pose: inside(butter_dairy, black_bowl) [completion]
  done_when: surface_contact(butter_dairy, black_bowl) AND released(butter_dairy)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: the body of the yellow butter dairy
the body of the yellow butter dairy
the interior of the black bowl
the interior of the black bowl
